commit_scope: Move kernel-router route class authoring from the BML-named section entry point to a route-specific high-level source dialect while preserving generic Form-native route objects.

commands: cd form && native prepared Go/Rust parity for source-language-route-class-template
local_validation.notes: Native prepared Go/Rust parity for source-language-route-class-template passed with go=525377 rust=525377. Rust cargo test passed with 39 tests. Local router smoke returned HTTP 200, body ok, X-Form-Router: native-kernel, and the server log showed the production manifest compiled via form-stdlib into a Form recipe object with 24 native routes.

ci_validation.notes: Remote CI is pending until the branch is pushed and a PR is opened.

deploy_validation.notes: Production verification is pending until PR checks pass, the branch is merged, deployment completes, and public verification runs.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: The production kernel-router manifest can author route classes in section [form.route], a route-specific high-level source dialect, while still lowering to the same generic LanguageTemplate, LanguageClass, KernelHTTPRouteDataRef, and native Form recipe objects.
test_flows: native prepared Go/Rust parity for source-language-route-class-template
local form-kernel-rust serve against deploy/kernel-router/production-routes.fk and curl /health?probe=route-dialect

phase_gate.notes: Local native proof and local HTTP proof are complete; CI, merge, deploy, and public verification remain pending.

evidence_refs: source-compiler.fk now treats form.route as a high-level Form source dialect beside form.bml and form.action.
production-routes.fk authors the HealthRoute class in section [form.route] while preserving the same language-route-class-kernel-route output.
The Rust route-manifest unit test now proves section [form.route] compiles into a RecipeObject route program.
The focused Go/Rust native parity band proves route-language template/class syntax still lowers to the same generic route cells.
The local HTTP smoke proves the production route manifest still serves /health from the native kernel.
